message:
feat(franken-node): require bd-3ar8v.7.5 substrate bead in strict mission gating [bd-3ar8v.7.5.2]

Add bd-3ar8v.7.5 to full_runtime_replacement.required_beads in
mission contract and QA docs policy fail-closed validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1427,7 +1427,12 @@ fn franken_node_mission_contract_tier_mapping_declares_required_checks_and_phase
         .iter()
         .filter_map(|entry| entry.as_str().map(ToOwned::to_owned))
         .collect();
-    for bead in ["bd-3ar8v.7.2", "bd-3ar8v.7.3", "bd-3ar8v.7.4"] {
+    for bead in [
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.2",
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.3",
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.4",
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.5",
+    ] {
         assert!(
             strict_beads.contains(bead),
             "full_runtime_replacement.required_beads must include {bead}"
